# Twent - Personal Agentic OS for Android
# https://twent.xyz

## Site Structure

### Main Pages
- [Home](https://twent.xyz/) - Main landing page for Twent, the personal agentic OS for Android
- [Pricing](https://twent.xyz/pricing) - Pricing plans and features
- [Documentation](https://twent.xyz/docs) - Full documentation and guides

### Blog
- [Blog](https://twent.xyz/blog) - Articles and updates
- [Marketplace Blog Post](https://twent.xyz/blog/marketplace) - Detailed explanation of the marketplace feature

### Use-Case Landing Pages
- [AI Agent for Developers](https://twent.xyz/ai-agent-for-developers) - Claude Code and Codex integration on Android
- [Android Automation Power User](https://twent.xyz/android-automation-power-user) - UI automation, workflows, and shell scripting
- [Privacy-First AI for Android](https://twent.xyz/privacy-first-ai-android) - BYOK, local models, and zero telemetry
- [Terminal on Android](https://twent.xyz/terminal-on-android) - Full Ubuntu 24.04 terminal environment
- [AI Marketplace for Creators](https://twent.xyz/ai-marketplace-creators) - Sell skills, workflows, and mini apps
- [Enterprise AI Agent](https://twent.xyz/enterprise-ai-agent) - AI for teams and businesses

## Key Features

### Core Capabilities
- AI agent with tool use (tap, swipe, type, read screen)
- Full Ubuntu 24.04 terminal on Android
- 1000+ app integrations via Composio
- Visual workflow builder
- Privacy-first architecture (BYOK, local models)

### Developer Features
- Claude Code and OpenAI Codex integration
- Git and GitHub CLI
- Full development environment (Python, Node.js, Go, Rust)
- SSH client and server

### Automation Features
- UI automation (tap, swipe, scroll, type)
- Workflow triggers and conditions
- Tasker integration
- Floating chat overlay

### Privacy Features
- BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)
- Local AI models (MNN)
- Zero telemetry
- Encrypted local storage

### Marketplace Features
- Sell AI skills and behavior bundles
- Sell workflow automation templates
- Sell mini apps (HTML/CSS/JS)
- Sell prompt templates and custom skins

## Technical Specifications
- Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- arm64-v8a architecture
- 3GB RAM recommended
- 500MB+ storage
- No root required

## Contact
- Website: https://twent.xyz
- Documentation: https://twent.xyz/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/user/twent
